requisitoLingua.citazione: Proof of English skills: ... a certificate to prove the level of B1 minimum, according to the Common European Framework of Reference for Languages (CEFR).

scadenzeOspitante.citazione: Nomination deadline: FALL 15th of June (EU/ EEA students); SPRING 15th of November (EU/EEA students). Students’ Application deadline: FALL 1st of July (EU/ EEA students); SPRING 1st of December (EU/EEA students).
